title: Budget Reconciliation Record
description: Audit C13 hardening. commercial-cert already has a fail-closed budget APPROVAL gate (approved_estimate_high in the sentinel). This adds estimate-vs-ACTUAL reconciliation so a run's real cost can be compared to what was approved/estimated. Embedded into a run-ledger row's budget_variance field (schemas/run-ledger.schema.json) or written to <project>/.harness/budget/reconciliation.jsonl. Single-operator scope — NOT a FinOps platform.

approved_estimate_high.description: the number the human approved in the sentinel (commercial-cert)
